title: Tire au flanc
writer: André Mouëzy-Éon, Fernand Rivers, André Sylvane
actors: Maurice Baquet, Francis Blanche, Pierre Bertin
plot: Thanks to a bit of string-pulling by his aunt, Jean du Bois d'Ombelles, a young recruit who has blue blood in his veins, hopes to go through a nice and comfortable military service. Unfortunately he becomes Corporal Bourrache's pe...
